agūḍha a. Not hidden, or concealed, manifest, clear: ˚sadbhāvaṃ  Ku. 5. 62. 
Comp.
— gaṃdha a. having an unconcealed smell.
— (dhaḥ) Asafœtida (the smell of which is not easily concealed).
— bhāva a.
1 having an open or unreserved disposition.
2 having an obvious meaning or import.
